notes.f1: Parentage, place, and christening date (8 Aug 1878) all match exactly, sourced to the church record. The tree's Birth fact records year only ('1878'), not the specific day/month (10 July 1878). Verified against the live FamilySearch record: that exact day is an unsourced fact there too — none of Lydia's three attached sources attest it. Recording year-only, sourced, is the epistemically correct call, not a shortcoming; label is 'true' on that basis, not 'partial'.
